title: Fujitora Faces the Revolutionary
description: Pages 11–11 focus on fujitora faces the revolutionary, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as sabo abandons restraint to protect Luffy, clashing with Fujitora as the final Dressrosa battle gathers everyone around the palace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Father, a lowly com- moner talked back to me! A tenryubito!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I want you to lend me your gun.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: father... it's because we live in such a filthy place like this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That mother got sick and died.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Because of my stupid father, by the time I was 8 years old I had seen the heaven of this world and the hell of this world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And so I killed him... and I took his head back to mariejois with me...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: -But the tenryubito who labeled us a "family of Trai- Tors" refused to ever accept me back as one of them...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: that I would destroy every last part of this world that they control ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The Life You've All Lead is Nothing Compared to What I've Gone Through!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: A grown man like me doesn't have the time to play your kiddy games!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: His shocking past is revealed in

summary: Fujitora Faces the Revolutionary develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
